texto: Faith is not a storm cellar to which men and women can flee for refuge from the storms of life. It is instead an inner force that gives them the strength to face those storms and their consequences with serenity of spirit.
explicacao: Citação de Sam J. Ervin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Faith is not a storm cellar to which men and women can flee for refuge from the storms of life. I…” articula fe, faith, unity em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e unity.
